assertions.assertion: Recommends setting options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false in test configuration
assertions.rationale: Does not mention KeyManagement.Enabled = false — only vaguely mentions 'in-memory approach' for developer signing credential

assertions.assertion: Recommends AddDeveloperSigningCredential(persistKey: false) to avoid disk writes
assertions.rationale: Mentions developer signing credential writes to disk but does not provide the persistKey: false fix

assertions.assertion: Warns against hard-coding localhost ports — use factory.CreateClient() BaseAddress instead
assertions.rationale: Warns against hard-coded ports and shows factory.CreateClient()

assertions.assertion: Mentions the risk of sharing HttpClient or ClaimsProvider state across parallel tests
assertions.rationale: Warns about shared HttpClient state and suggests IAsyncLifetime
